commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary | 2026-07-13

NYSE maintains dominance with the lowest ILLIQ metric (0.0074), indicating minimal price impact per traded unit, though its AR spread (0.6357%) sits mid-range. Nasdaq 100 surprisingly shows superior tightness despite higher spreads, driven by exceptional ILLIQ efficiency (0.0024). Conversely, LSE ranks last with deteriorated liquidity across both dimensions—ILLIQ of 0.0959 and the widest spread at 0.7724%—suggesting structural headwinds in UK equities trading.
